data.name: Hentai Celestia
data.detailed_description:
🌌 Hentai Celestia is an erotic hentai puzzle game that transports you to majestic celestial halls, where a divine paladin with amethyst eyes and a glowing halo gazes at you through the winds of the cosmos… 👑 Only the most resilient players will piece her together and uncover her heavenly passion! 🔥




✨ Game features:
💖 30 majestic levels that reveal her celestial beauty and sensual power!
🏆 30 achievements — for true connoisseurs of divine pleasure!
🖼️ Gallery — preserve and admire all unlocked scenes in the calm of the temple!


🎚️ Difficulty levels:


  • Easy — drift into heavenly harmony!


  • Normal — explore deeper layers of her enchanting essence!


  • Hard — shatter holiness to unveil her true desire… piece by piece 😉


✨ Lose yourself in her eyes, and let every solved puzzle bring you closer to her sacred, forbidden touch. 👑🔥

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 保加利亞文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 荷蘭文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*, 印尼語*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB GeForce or AMD
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11
  • Processor: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 2 GB GeForce or AMD
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 500 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
